targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*)::double precision AS value FROM applications;
SELECT COUNT(*)::double precision AS value FROM applications WHERE COALESCE(job_state, '') = 'safe_auto_apply';

SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN LOWER(COALESCE(status, '')) = 'applied' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2)::double precision AS value FROM applications WHERE COALESCE(job_state, '') = 'safe_auto_apply';

SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(job_state, ''), '(empty)') AS job_state, COUNT(*)::bigint AS total_rows, SUM(CASE WHEN LOWER(COALESCE(status, '')) = 'applied' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::bigint AS applied_rows FROM applications GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY total_rows DESC;

panels.title: Rows and applied counts by job_state

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(job_state, ''), '(empty)') AS job_state, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN LOWER(COALESCE(status, '')) = 'applied' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS applied_rate_pct FROM applications GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY applied_rate_pct DESC NULLS LAST;

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('week', CAST(applied_at AS timestamptz)) AS time, COALESCE(NULLIF(job_state, ''), '(empty)') AS metric, COUNT(*)::double precision AS value FROM applications WHERE COALESCE(applied_at, '') <> '' AND LOWER(COALESCE(status, '')) = 'applied' GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1,2;

panels.title: Applied counts by week and job_state

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*)::double precision AS value FROM applications WHERE COALESCE(application_decision->>'safe_to_submit', 'false') = 'true';

SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN LOWER(COALESCE(status, '')) = 'applied' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2)::double precision AS value FROM applications WHERE COALESCE(application_decision->>'safe_to_submit', 'false') = 'true';

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('week', CAST(applied_at AS timestamptz)) AS time, COUNT(*)::double precision AS value FROM applications WHERE COALESCE(application_decision->>'safe_to_submit', 'false') = 'true' AND COALESCE(applied_at, '') <> '' AND LOWER(COALESCE(status, '')) = 'applied' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(job_state, ''), '(empty)') AS job_state, COUNT(*)::bigint AS total_rows, SUM(CASE WHEN LOWER(COALESCE(status, '')) = 'applied' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::bigint AS applied_rows FROM applications WHERE COALESCE(application_decision->>'safe_to_submit', 'false') = 'true' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY total_rows DESC;

SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(job_state, ''), '(empty)') AS job_state, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN LOWER(COALESCE(status, '')) = 'applied' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS applied_rate_pct FROM applications WHERE COALESCE(application_decision->>'safe_to_submit', 'false') = 'true' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY applied_rate_pct DESC NULLS LAST;
